name: Copper
description: Copper is a CRM designed for Google Workspace. Manage leads, people, companies, opportunities, projects, tasks, activities, and custom fields with deep Gmail and Google Calendar integration for relationship-driven sales teams.

capabilities.name: leads_get
capabilities.description: Fetch a single lead record by its ID.

capabilities.name: leads_create
capabilities.description: Create a new lead record with name, email, and company details.

capabilities.name: leads_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing lead record by ID.

capabilities.name: leads_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a lead record by ID.

capabilities.name: leads_search
capabilities.description: Search and filter lead records with pagination, sorting, and field-based filters.

capabilities.name: leads_upsert
capabilities.description: Create or update a lead by matching on email or custom field.

capabilities.name: leads_convert
capabilities.description: Convert a lead into a person and optionally an opportunity.

capabilities.name: leads_activities_list
capabilities.description: List activities associated with a specific lead.

capabilities.name: lead_statuses_list
capabilities.description: List all available lead statuses.

capabilities.name: people_get
capabilities.description: Fetch a single person (contact) record by ID.

capabilities.name: people_create
capabilities.description: Create a new person record with name, email, and contact details.

capabilities.name: people_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing person record by ID.

capabilities.name: people_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a person record by ID.

capabilities.name: people_search
capabilities.description: Search and filter people records with sorting and pagination.

capabilities.name: people_fetch_by_email
capabilities.description: Look up a person record by their email address.

capabilities.name: companies_get
capabilities.description: Fetch a single company record by ID.

capabilities.name: companies_create
capabilities.description: Create a new company record.

capabilities.name: companies_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing company record by ID.

capabilities.name: companies_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a company record by ID.

capabilities.name: companies_search
capabilities.description: Search and filter company records with sorting and pagination.

capabilities.name: opportunities_get
capabilities.description: Fetch a single opportunity record by ID.

capabilities.name: opportunities_create
capabilities.description: Create a new sales opportunity with value and pipeline stage.

capabilities.name: opportunities_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing opportunity record by ID.

capabilities.name: opportunities_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an opportunity record by ID.

capabilities.name: opportunities_search
capabilities.description: Search and filter opportunity records by pipeline, status, and other criteria.

capabilities.name: pipelines_list
capabilities.description: List all sales pipelines configured in the account.

capabilities.name: pipeline_stages_list
capabilities.description: List all stages within a specific pipeline.

capabilities.name: customer_sources_list
capabilities.description: List all customer source options.

capabilities.name: loss_reasons_list
capabilities.description: List all loss reason options for opportunities.

capabilities.name: projects_get
capabilities.description: Fetch a single project record by ID.

capabilities.name: projects_create
capabilities.description: Create a new project record.

capabilities.name: projects_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing project record by ID.

capabilities.name: projects_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a project record by ID.

capabilities.name: projects_search
capabilities.description: Search and filter project records.

capabilities.name: tasks_get
capabilities.description: Fetch a single task by ID.

capabilities.name: tasks_create
capabilities.description: Create a new task with due date and assignee.

capabilities.name: tasks_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing task by ID.

capabilities.name: tasks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a task by ID.

capabilities.name: tasks_search
capabilities.description: Search and filter tasks.

capabilities.name: activities_get
capabilities.description: Fetch a single activity by ID.

capabilities.name: activities_create
capabilities.description: Create a new activity (note, call, or meeting) on a record.

capabilities.name: activities_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing activity by ID.

capabilities.name: activities_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an activity by ID.

capabilities.name: activities_search
capabilities.description: Search and filter activities.

capabilities.name: activity_types_list
capabilities.description: List all activity types configured in the account.

capabilities.name: tags_list
capabilities.description: List all tags in the account.

capabilities.name: custom_field_definitions_list
capabilities.description: List all custom field definitions.

capabilities.name: custom_field_definitions_create
capabilities.description: Create a new custom field definition.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a webhook subscription for entity events.

capabilities.name: webhooks_list
capabilities.description: List all webhook subscriptions.

capabilities.name: webhooks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a webhook subscription by ID.

capabilities.name: account_get
capabilities.description: Fetch account details for the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: users_list
capabilities.description: List all users in the Copper account.
